missed_actual_themes: Construction/permit status for Perfect Day Mexico (confirmation that construction has resumed)
Whether 2024/2026 European yield headwinds are expected to fully reverse in 2027
Operational responses to higher fuel (itinerary changes) and whether spend/initiatives were deferred
Impact of higher North American airfares on consumer behavior for U.S. itineraries
overpredicted_themes: Capital allocation priorities and buyback/dividend triggers
Fleet/orderbook optionality and ship-level Icon/Legend ROIC/APD detail
Q2 EPS itemization and cadence reconciliation
Occupancy versus price trade-off strategy in the Caribbean
Detailed onboard category mix and gross/net margin reporting
summary: Coverage was solid on Med booking dynamics, yield decomposition, destination ramp, hedging, and loyalty monetization, yielding 8/12 actuals covered. Precision was moderate (56/110 useful), with many overpredictions on capital allocation, JV/TUI, and ship-level economics. Misses centered on Mexico construction status, 2027 rebound of Europe headwinds, itinerary changes due to fuel, and NA airfare impacts.
